entities.label: tornado
entities.description: violently rotating column of air that is in contact with both the earth's surface and a cumulonimbus cloud in the air

entities.label: plant
entities.description: living thing in the kingdom of photosynthetic eukaryotes

entities.label: water
entities.description: chemical compound whose molecules are formed by two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom

entities.label: climate
entities.description: long-term statistical characterization of atmospheric conditions in a region, typically averaged over periods of 30 years or more

entities.label: Neptune
entities.description: eighth and farthest planet from the Sun in the Solar System, mainly composed of ice and rock

entities.label: fire
entities.description: rapid oxidation of a material; phenomenon that emits light and heat

entities.label: Earth
entities.description: third planet from the Sun in the Solar System

entities.label: forest
entities.description: dense collection of trees covering a relatively large area

entities.label: Mars
entities.description: fourth planet from the Solar System, tellurian and orange-red due to iron oxide

entities.label: climate change
entities.description: human-caused changes to climate on Earth

entities.label: volcano
entities.description: natural, surface vent or fissure usually in a mountainous form

entities.label: nature
entities.description: natural, physical, or material world and its phenomena

entities.label: Sun
entities.description: star at the centre of the Solar System

entities.label: koala
entities.description: arboreal herbivorous marsupial native to Australia
